name: enableit-app-kinetix
description: Kinetix Hand application derived from Kinetix project by reivaxy on github, https://github.com/reivaxy/kinetix, adapted for enable.it platform, providing pressure sensor-based hand control and servo actuation.
keywords: enableit, kinetix, hand, application, servo, pressure
